name: trail-boss
description: Trail Boss — Unit 6 Texas History strategy game (TEKS 7.6A, 7.6B, 7.6C). Drive 2,500 longhorns up a historic cattle trail — Chisholm, Goodnight-Loving, or Western (solo, three variants) — over a server-authoritative Socket.IO backend with a live Teacher Command Center that groups accuracy by trail.
comment: No npm workspaces: this drive is exFAT, which cannot host the symlinks/junctions workspace linking requires. server/ and client/ install independently; `npm install` here cascades via postinstall.

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server --no-fund --no-audit && npm install --prefix client --no-fund --no-audit
